title: Jule's craftable enchantments
description: This datapack makes every enchantment and curse craft-able as well as some crafting tweaks!
body:
This datapack makes every enchantment and curse craft-able as well as adding heart of the sea duplication, this datapack also adds craft-able notch apple, elytra, tridents and EXP bottles! ENJOY! - This datapack is trying to be as balanced as possible!

(You craft Notch apples by double coating apples in gold ingots)
